Chris Elvin

2026-04-16

Today

Warmup question

[1] "How was your spring break?"
name answer
TAKAHASHI SAKI I went to different venues and enjoyed music I like.
SAITOU MIREI I went to hot spring. I was able to relax well.
TEJIMA SEIYA It was wonderful. I relaxed so much.
KUJIRAOKA SERA It was very nice! I went to Hokkaido for three days with my friends. I ate very delicious food there. For example. soup curry and fish! I think that I will go there again!
SAKAE AKARI I went to Koshien stadium with my father. I was fun to watch the baseball games.
CHIKUMA KAHO It wa very nice. I went to Kanazawa. This place has a lot of delicious food.Also I went shopping with friends.
YAMAGUCHI KAHO I did my part-time job very hard.
ONISHI NANAKA I went to license training camp.
SAKANASHI KANO I did a lot of part time job.
KUBOTA ANNA It was a fulfilling and enjoyable time.
FUKAYA MINA It was very fun. I went to Yamanashi with my friends.
AKIYAMA RURUKO It was very fulfilling. This is because, I went to many places such as Hakone and strawberry picking by car！
KIMURA HARUA I went to many places. Especially Nagasaki and Vietnam were very fun.
INO YUYA Very good. It was fun. I could earn much money.
ABE HIKARI It was fan. My best memory is that tripped tiwan
KIHARA MOE So good! I visited many places from Japan to abroad ．
OTANI WASEI My spring break was good. I went to Yugawara and enjoyed playing fencing
MATSUHISA HONOKA I went to Australia for studying abroad. I learned Australian culture from my host family. I enjoyed walking along a beautiful beach!
NEGISHI HANA It was fun. I worked pretty hard and read a lot of books. I also traveled to some places. I enjoyed Thailand the most.
TAKEMOTO MEIBI I went out with my friends many times. I enjoyed watching movie and eat a variety of things.
SAWADA MANATO I traveled many times during spring break. It was really fun.
KOJIMA TAKUMI I got my driver’s license. it’s very helpful.
YOSHIZAWA NONOKA I met my friends a lot. Watching movies, my birthday party, and so on.
YAHAGI AYA I enjoyed very much!
YAJIMA KOUDAI It was a great time to visit Fukui prefecture
TEZUKA ASUMI I spent my spring break watching movies. I watched a foreign film for the first time and was reminded of how wonderful foreign films can be.
YUZAWA SANA very fun.
KONDO AN It was really good but too hard for me because of my club activities.
